text:
I removed the line you mentioned from that file and it installed fine.  
When I initially installed my system, I chose to not install any 
packages - perhaps something is added to that file incorrectly?  (I 
really don't know, just trying to help maybe isolate the problem so 
others don't encounter it.)  It now works well on my system - thank you.
